title: Crafted Create (3)
description: Crafted Create is a new Modpack built around the Create Mod!
body:
- **What is Crafted Create 3?**
	 - 
	Crafted Create 3 is a new Modpack based around the popular Create Mod.
 - **What can you do in Crafted Create? What makes it different from other Create Modpacks?**
	 - 
	Crafted Create has many awesome new Features and Mods inclusing:
	 - Many Create Addons like Steam n Rails to add stunning new features to your Create Factories!
	 - Farmers Delight + some Addons to add new crops and new interesting ways to make food, theres also an addon to make it compatible with create!
	 - a new Recipe Viewer called EMI, which is basically JEI but better, it even has compatibility with JEI to load JEI recipes!
	 - many new building blocks and decorations from Chipped, Rechsiseled, Twigs, Another Furniture, Create and many more!
	 - many QOL Mods, FPS Mods and Optifine Replacements!
